settings.heading: Thank you for celebrating New Year's Eve with Luxury London Events!

settings.text: Give customers details about the banner image(s) or content on the template.

settings.heading: Luxury London Escapes: The Mykonos Edit

settings.text:
A limited number of couples are invited to join us in Mykonos from 11th–14th September for an exclusive three-night hosted escape, limited to just 10 couples.

Designed as a curated group experience, this intimate gathering brings together like-minded couples for a series of elevated shared moments, balanced with time to enjoy the island at your own pace.

Your experience includes:

• Return airport transfers in Mykonos

• Three nights in a boutique five-star spa hotel with daily breakfast - Junior Suite with Sea View

• Friday sunset dinner at Zuma Mykonos, with a curated dining experience and welcome drinks to open the weekend

• Saturday four-hour private cruise, beginning in the late afternoon and flowing into sunset, with BBQ, drinks, music, and an all-white dress code at sea

• Signature Sunday closing at an iconic beach setting, with a reserved table and a pre-selected bottle allocation for our circle

A refined balance of shared experiences and personal freedom, created for couples who value quality, atmosphere and seamless planning.

Register your interest using the form below.

Optional Enhancements:

For couples wishing to personalise their stay further, a collection of privately curated experiences can be arranged, including signature spa treatments, guided island exploration, intimate wine tastings, helicopter flights over the Cyclades, private culinary experiences, secluded beach picnics, priority access to Mykonos’ most sought-after restaurants and clubs, and dedicated chauffeur-driven transfers throughout your stay.
